title: chromolaena orbignyana
intro: Chromolaena orbignyana, also known as Tree Senna or Lantana leaf, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Americas and parts of Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Chromolaena orbignyana is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
